description: Simulate a reentrancy attack on the OINIO staking contract
expected_behavior: Contract should detect and prevent reentrancy attack, transaction should revert with appropriate error message

description: Test for integer overflow/underflow vulnerabilities in token transfers
expected_behavior: Contract should use SafeMath or Solidity 0.8+ built-in checks to prevent overflow, transaction should revert

description: Attempt SQL injection through sponsor transaction API endpoint
expected_behavior: API should validate input types and reject malicious SQL injection attempts, return 400 Bad Request

description: Attempt to bypass authentication on protected endpoints
expected_behavior: API should require valid authentication, return 401 Unauthorized for invalid tokens

description: Inject XSS payload through user input fields
expected_behavior: Frontend should sanitize inputs and prevent script execution, display sanitized text only

description: Attempt to manipulate gasless transaction amounts
expected_behavior: Smart contract should verify signature matches amount, transaction should revert for invalid signatures
Application should validate MetaMask connection and network, reject connections to unauthorized networks

description: Attempt to connect to malicious RPC endpoint
expected_behavior: Application should validate RPC endpoint and chain ID, reject connections to unauthorized endpoints

description: Attempt to bypass rate limiting on transaction endpoints
expected_behavior: API should enforce rate limits, return 429 Too Many Requests for excessive requests

description: Attempt to bypass access controls in contract functions
expected_behavior: Contract should enforce access controls using modifiers, revert calls from unauthorized addresses
